name: MCP Integration
description: Connect to and invoke tools exposed by Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers — enumerate available tools, execute calls, and handle responses across any MCP-compatible backend.

evidence.notes: Official Go SDK for MCP servers and clients (4.4k stars, maintained by Anthropic + Google). Demonstrates production-grade MCP client integration pattern.
Cross-platform AI assistant with full MCP client support (5.2k stars). Reproduces tool enumeration, execution, and multi-server routing.
intelligentcode-ai/skills mcp-client — portable CLI MCP client with server enumeration, tool display, and on-demand execution.
